title: Tender
description: Data contract for a single government tender/procurement notice. Terminology follows the national standard used by the Central Public Procurement Portal (CPPP), GeM, and GFR 2017. Producer (workflow) and consumer (website) share exactly this schema; if a record does not validate, it does not publish.

id.description: Internal stable identifier (does not change across refreshes).

nit_ref.description: Notice Inviting Tender (NIT) reference / tender reference number as published by the procuring entity.

plain_summary.description: Editorial one-line, plain-language, what-is-being-procured-first summary. Must contain no unverified claim.

state.description: State/UT of the procuring entity, or 'All India' for central.

product_category.description: Product/service category (controlled vocabulary, e.g. Construction, IT, Electrical, Railway, Defence, Healthcare, Solar).

pac_inr.description: Probable Amount of Contract (estimated tender value) in INR. Null if not disclosed.

emd_inr.description: Earnest Money Deposit in INR. Null if exempt/not disclosed.

bid_submission_end.description: Bid submission end date/time. Required (non-null) when status is 'Active' — enforced by business rule, not schema.

status.description: Lifecycle state. The four public views (Forthcoming / Active / Archived / Award of Contract) are filters over this field.

corrigendum.description: Official amendments to the tender after publication. A corrigendum supersedes the original for the fields it touches.

documents.description: Tender document package (NIT document, BOQ, technical specs, etc.).

url.description: HTTPS URL on an official government domain.

award.description: Award of Contract (AoC) / bid award details. Present when status is 'Awarded' or 'Archived' with a known result.

source_tier.description: Authority tier of the corroborating source(s). Only tier_1 may be shown as verified on its own.

source_urls.description: One or more source URLs. At least one must be an official government domain.

trust_score.description: 0-100 corroboration/trust score assigned by the pipeline. Publish gate requires >= threshold.

discovered_by.description: Provenance of the record: deterministic pipeline or the Discovery Agent (agent records always route through review before first publish).

last_verified.description: When this record was last corroborated against an official source.

changelog_ref.description: Pointer into the append-only changelog for this record's material changes.
